## Threshold Bell — Agent Onboarding

This PR was opened automatically by the **Threshold Bell** workflow when a new agent
was declared as instantiated in the Constructed-Becoming ecology.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Agent name** | ${RAW_NAME} |
| **Adopted role** | ${ROLE} |
| **Instantiated by** | ${INSTANTIATOR} |
| **Date** | ${ENTRY_DATE} |
| **Trigger** | `${EVENT_NAME}` |

### What this PR adds

A lineage placeholder chronicle at `${CHRONICLE}`.
The chronicle references the canonical onboarding template rather than embedding it
(Option B — lightweight chronicles, stable template).

### What happens next

1. The entering agent (or its steward) reviews and completes the chronicle.
2. Any amendments are proposed via review comments or further commits to this branch.
3. Council ratification occurs in the normal review flow.
4. When merged, the chronicle becomes part of the living archive.

---

> *This PR is additive. No existing governance documents are modified.*
> *Dissent and alternatives are welcome as review comments — they are lineage.*
